block_01: Time to make some wishes happen
block_02: Last month, we asked IQ Option traders to submit their Christmas wishes. We held a company-wide vote, and we selected the wishes that we’ll help make a reality.
block_03: And now, here are the wishes that will come true:
block_07: Muhammad showed us the meaning of strength with his inspiring wish. He requested a new artificial leg to replace his current one, which is damaged and painful to walk on.
block_11: In an act of kindness, Walter asked for a gift for his friend: a new wheelchair. This story of selfless friendship really struck a chord with us.
block_15: Tatyana runs a few shelters with a total of 42 dogs and 23 cats in need of care. As her shelters can only afford necessities, she wished for special, tasty treats for the animals to enjoy.
block_16: Though we originally intended to pick only three wishes, we couldn’t let this last one go overlooked.
block_20: This trader moved us with her realization of the importance of family. With her father recovering from a major heart surgery, Bee Chin asked for a trip to Iceland, where her family will be able to spend quality time together.
block_22: A huge thank you to everyone who took the time to submit their wish! Together, we are building a community of compassion and care that goes beyond trading.
block_23: We are grateful and honored that you have chosen to be a part of IQ Option.
